title: distichlis humilis
intro: Distichlis humilis, also known as alkali grass or salt grass, is a perennial grass native to North America, particularly found in salt marshes and saline soils. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Distichlis humilis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Distichlis humilis often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
